product_surfaces: internal/gitcode RouteSchemaMatrix DefaultRouteSchemaMatrix() constructor with six per-product-area SurfaceSpec entries (issues/labels/milestones supported OpenAPI, wiki supported live_probe, PR/comments deferred deferred with unsupported_capability diagnostics)
internal/gitcode RouteSchemaMatrix.Spec() lookup returning SurfaceSpec for declared areas and false for unknown areas
internal/gitcode RouteSchemaMatrix.RequireDeclared() returning nil for declared areas and error for undeclared areas

internal/gitcode RouteSchemaMatrix.ValidateCoverage() accepting all six required areas and rejecting missing areas, unknown enums, non-/api/v5 route families, contradictory evidence/status pairings, and deferred/unsupported specs without unsupported_capability diagnostics
internal/gitcode RouteSchemaMatrix.Preflight() returning nil for supported areas and ErrUnsupportedCapability with correct CapabilityKey for deferred PR/comments
internal/gitcode NewLiveProvider with DefaultRouteSchemaMatrix() validating all six product areas and returning a usable live provider
internal/gitcode NewLiveProvider with WithRouteSchemaMatrix option accepting a custom matrix and rejecting matrices with missing areas or bad enums at construction time
internal/gitcode liveProvider.ListIssueComments() consulting matrix preflight before any HTTP dispatch and returning ErrUnsupportedCapability for deferred comments_ read surface
internal/gitcode liveProvider.ListIssues() reaching the mocked httptest /api/v5 server successfully through a matrix-equipped live provider
internal/gitcode ErrUnsupportedCapability error type with DiagnosticCode() returning "unsupported_capability", CapabilityKey, and Message fields
internal/gitcode IsUnsupportedCapability() predicate recognizing ErrUnsupportedCapability errors
internal/provider/live type aliases for RouteSchemaMatrix, SurfaceSpec, UnsupportedDiagnostic, ProductArea, SupportStatus, EvidenceClass, ErrUnsupportedCapability
internal/diagnostics CodeUnsupportedCapability constant and classifier wiring through classifyCode, exitClassFor ("capability"), httpAttemptedFor (false), retryableFor (false), messageFor
full Go package suite via go test ./...
repository whitespace validation via git diff --check
evidence_type: offline executable Go test runtime validation using httptest.Server for external GitCode-compatible HTTP dependency plus full go test ./... suite and git diff --check; 13 focused matrix scenario tests exercise RouteSchemaMatrix construction, lookup, validation, preflight, live provider integration, and classifier integration through production code paths
freshness: current source tree at validation execution time; focused internal/gitcode route_schema_matrix_test.go and client_test.go scenario tests, diagnostics classifier_test.go capability test, go test ./..., and git diff --check with all GitCode credential and network variables unset

mocks_used.name: httptest GitCode /api/v5 server
mocks_used.scope: external GitCode-compatible HTTP dependency only; target live provider construction, matrix preflight gate, ListIssues dispatch, ListIssueComments deferral, and ErrUnsupportedCapability return paths remain production code
